message:
feat(wire_protocol): add Aggregator benchmarks and interleaving/rollback tests (wa-nu4.4.3.3)

Criterion benchmarks for single/multi-agent ingest throughput, dedup
rejection, stale pruning, and envelope serde overhead. Nine new unit
tests covering rollback_accepted, snapshot roundtrip, interleaved
multi-agent ordering with gaps/duplicates, capacity eviction with
stale pruning, and burst-from-many-agents invariants.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
